title.en: Electroacoustics - Hearing aids - Part 0: Measurement of the performance characteristics of hearing aids

standards.scope: Measurement of hearing aid performance characteristics
standards.abstract: Specifies methods for measuring the electroacoustical characteristics of hearing aids for the purpose of quality assurance in production.

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 1: Requirements and testing for freedom of holes

standards.scope: Medical gloves for single use - Requirements for freedom of holes
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for freedom from holes in medical gloves for single use.

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 2: Requirements and testing for physical properties

standards.scope: Medical gloves for single use - Requirements for physical properties
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for physical properties (dimensions, tensile strength, freedom from pinholes) of medical gloves for single use.

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 3: Requirements and testing for biological evaluation

standards.scope: Medical gloves for single use - Requirements for biological evaluation
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for the biological evaluation of medical gloves for single use, including accelerated ageing and biocompatibility.

title.en: Patient handling equipment used in ambulances - Part 2: Power assisted stretcher

standards.scope: Patient handling equipment in ambulances - Power assisted stretchers
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for power-assisted stretchers used for patient handling in road ambulances.

title.en: Patient handling equipment used in ambulances - Part 6: Powered chairs

standards.scope: Patient handling equipment in ambulances - Powered chairs
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for powered patient chairs used for patient handling in road ambulances.

title.en: Processing of health care products - Information to be provided by the medical device manufacturer for the processing of medical devices - Part 2: Non-critical medical devices (ISO 17664-2:2021)

standards.scope: Information for reprocessing of re-usable medical devices by users - Validation methods
standards.abstract: Specifies validation methods and guidance for reprocessing instructions provided by medical device manufacturers for re-usable devices.

title.en: Sterilizers for medical purposes - Small steam sterilizers - Requirements and testing

standards.scope: Small steam sterilizers - Requirements and testing
standards.abstract: Specifies performance requirements and test methods for small steam sterilizers and sterilization cycles used in healthcare facilities.

title.en: Aseptic processing of health care products - Part 1: General requirements (ISO 13408-1:2023)

standards.scope: Aseptic processing of health care products - General requirements
standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for processes, programmes and procedures for the development, validation and routine control of aseptic processing.

title.en: Aseptic processing of health care products - Part 6: Isolator systems (ISO 13408-6:2021)

standards.scope: Aseptic processing of health care products - Isolator systems
standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for isolator systems used for aseptic processing of health care products.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Liquid chemical sterilizing agents for single-use medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives (ISO 14160:2020)

standards.scope: Liquid chemical sterilizing agents for single-use medical devices utilizing animal tissues
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a liquid chemical sterilization process for single-use medical devices.

title.en: Sterilizers for medical purposes - Low temperature steam and formaldehyde sterilizers - Requirements and testing

standards.scope: Low temperature steam and formaldehyde sterilizers - Requirements and testing
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for low temperature steam and formaldehyde (LTSF) sterilizers.

title.en: Stainless steel steam boilers

standards.scope: Stainless steel steam boilers for sterilization
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for stainless steel pressurised steam boilers used in sterilization equipment in healthcare facilities.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Moist heat - Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices (ISO 17665:2024)

standards.scope: Moist heat sterilization process development, validation and routine control
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of moist heat sterilization processes for medical devices.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Low temperature steam and formaldehyde - Requirements for development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices (ISO 25424:2018)

standards.scope: Low temperature steam and formaldehyde sterilization - Process requirements
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a low temperature steam and formaldehyde (LTSF) sterilization process.

title.en: Sterilization - Steam sterilizers - Large sterilizers

standards.scope: Large steam sterilizers - Design, construction, performance and safety
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and tests for large steam sterilizers used primarily in healthcare facilities.

title.en: Sterilization of medical devices - Requirements for medical devices to be designated STERILE - Part 1: Requirements for terminally sterilized medical devices

standards.scope: Requirements for terminally sterilized medical devices to be designated sterile
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for terminally sterilized medical devices to be designated 'STERILE', based on a defined maximum theoretical probability of a non-sterile item.

title.en: Sterilization of medical devices - Requirements for medical devices to be designated STERILE - Part 2: Requirements for aseptically processed medical devices

standards.scope: Requirements for aseptically processed medical devices to be designated sterile
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for aseptically processed medical devices to be designated 'STERILE'.

title.en: Neurosurgical implants - Sterile, single-use hydrocephalus shunts and components (ISO 7197:2024)

standards.scope: Sterile, single-use hydrocephalus shunts and components
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for implantable cerebrospinal fluid shunt assemblies and components used for the treatment of hydrocephalus.

title.en: Non-active surgical implants - General requirements (ISO 14630:2024)

standards.scope: Non-active surgical implants - General requirements
standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for non-active surgical implants, including intended performance, design attributes, materials, and packaging.

title.en: Non-active surgical implants - Joint replacement implants - Specific requirements for hip-joint replacement implants (ISO 21535:2023)

standards.scope: Joint replacement implants - Specific requirements for hip joint
standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for total and partial hip joint replacement implants.

title.en: Non-active surgical implants - Joint replacement implants - Specific requirements for knee-joint replacement implants (ISO 21536:2023)

standards.scope: Joint replacement implants - Specific requirements for knee joint
standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for total and partial knee joint replacement implants.

title.en: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements and test methods - Part 1: Surgical drapes and gowns

standards.scope: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements for surgical drapes and gowns
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for single-use and reusable surgical drapes and gowns to help prevent contamination transfer.

title.en: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements and test methods - Part 2: Clean air suits

standards.scope: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements for clean air suits
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for clean air suits used during surgical procedures.

title.en: Medical face masks - Requirements and test methods

standards.scope: Medical face masks - Requirements and test methods
standards.abstract: Specifies construction, design and performance requirements and test methods for medical face masks.
